title: BioHazard : Blight
description: A Infection Mod. World's stolen by a threat unkown.
body: The Blight has come to spread further. And Terra is it's new target. Defend your home from a ever relenting threat growing in power and size as the day's go on, create your own allies in the form the Night Mold. And stop your world from becoming another hellscape like many others.
